stim: MAVE SHRULLED OD HUS SPOMES ROAT OSE PUCKED UD REE COS KEES
OT WAM O MOUGH LONK RIMP SCROUGH REE RUD OSE MOT HOWED
OT OS VODY MUME O MOLLER OY BOACHING REE FEELLOTIONS OY CORCORITY
HUS WROLL BLONS EAFS DOLDED INSAWS REE USIVE OBUL OY HUS FOPE
E TEEK REE PAPE OSE CHEVEL OSE WEWS OOT OD REE POLKS
IF WE LOOK AT RECENT ART WE FIND IT PREOCCUPIED WITH FORM
HE TOLD HIMSELF HE HAD NEVER SEEN TWO PEOPLE EAT SO MUCH
HE SAT UP AND WATCHED AS THEY PULLED THEMSELVES OVER THE STERN
I WENT TO VISIT ALFRED IN THE KINGSTON HOSPITAL A FEW TIMES
HE WENT TO THE FRONT DOOR AND OPENED IT AND LOOKED IN
